label: Transparent fen pools motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Fen transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a fen pools landscape motif for a Morphous design-system catalog, isolated as one complete emblematic subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact mineral wetland fen scene as a single cutout motif: shallow clear water pools with rounded edges, pale marl sediment shelves, sedge-green grasses and rush clumps, small calcium-rich stones, submerged mineral texture, faint ripples, and a quiet ecological system mood. It should read clearly as fen pools: clear water, marl, sedge, mineral wetland.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include a cluster of pools, sedge margins, marl edges, and small mineral deposits without cropping. Naturalistic miniature landscape, crisp edge silhouette, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no animals, no people, no buildings, no boats, no trees as the main subject, no bog darkness, no swamp mud, no fantasy glow, no text, no watermark, no generic lake, no tropical colors, no saturated purple/blue gradients.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fen light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Fen", derived from a mineral wetland fen pools motif. This board is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible quiet ecological system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board intended for 3840x2160 export, clean professional UI design-system presentation, large legible labels and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fen, Fen, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Ecology Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from sedge green grasses, shallow clear water pools, pale marl sediment shelves, calcium-rich mineral stones, submerged pool texture, and quiet wetland ecology. The board must read as fen pools and mineral wetland, not generic green SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Field Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: icon buttons, primary/secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards for water clarity and habitat health, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: quiet ecological system, shadcn/tweakcn-style product UI, 8px radius, marl-white backgrounds, sedge-green primary actions, clear-water focus rings, mineral beige panels, soft blue-green charts, fine pool-ripple dividers, subtle marl texture, accessible contrast, precise grid.
Palette names to show: Marl White, Fen Ink, Sedge Green, Clear Water, Marl Shelf, Reed Shadow, Mineral Stone, Pool Glass, Peat Depth.
Constraints: no animals, no people, no buildings, no boats, no bog darkness, no swamp mud, no neon, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no stock landscape photo panels, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fen", no tiny unreadable text.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Fen dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Fen". It must feel like the light-mode board translated to dark mode and remain derived from a mineral wetland fen pools motif.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board intended for 3840x2160 export, clean professional UI design-system presentation, large legible labels and no tiny paragraphs.
Required visible sections: Morphous Fen, Fen, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Ecology Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve sedge-green active states, clear-water focus rings, pale marl highlights, mineral stone borders, pool-ripple dividers, and quiet ecological rhythm. Must read as fen pools and calcium-rich mineral wetland, not generic dark green SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, Japanese UI, Field Notes. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: icon buttons, primary/secondary buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards for water clarity and habitat health, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: peat-depth ink background, dark mineral panels, sedge-green buttons, pool-glass foreground accents, marl-white text highlights, clear-water charts, reed-shadow muted states, subtle marl and ripple textures, calm accessible contrast, 8px radius, precise shadcn/tweakcn grid.
Palette names to show: Marl White, Fen Ink, Sedge Green, Clear Water, Marl Shelf, Reed Shadow, Mineral Stone, Pool Glass, Peat Depth.
Constraints: no animals, no people, no buildings, no boats, no bog darkness as mud, no neon, no pure-black-only flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no stock landscape photo panels, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Fen".
